name: Overview_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Overview_View AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Status_Analysis

name: Exploration_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_View AS SELECT Customer_Info.gender, Customer_Info.senior_citizen, Customer_Info.under_30, Customer_Info.partner, Customer_Info.dependents, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id

name: Detail_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Detail_View AS SELECT Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.gender, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id

name: Insight_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Insight_View AS SELECT Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.customer_status, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Status_Analysis
